reviews.review_text: I stayed here for a week, and i cannot commend the kitchen and activity staff higher. the staff running our activities were engaging and fun, happy to offer their opinions and knowledge, and let our group enjoy the activities in our own way. The kitchen staff are lovely and the food is, quite genuinely, top quality. Lovely atmosphere and vibe at the camp ground, and i have nothing but good opinions; 12/10 would definitely stay here again, thank you so much to all the staff at Apex Camps! 🧡
Awesome staff, Ebony and Peter were both excellent and fun leaders, the chefs were also amazing. Activities were fun and kept everyone entertained. Food and menu were great and delicious.

There are lice and spiders and roaches in the cabin. the food poisoned us with raw chicken and not good meals vegetarian or gluten-free meals the camp was dog poop and I never want to come back and if I come back I hated every minute I honestly wouldn't of given them a star
Great food, amazing staff, outstanding activities, just the beds are hard in the front 2 dorms

I want there for camp with my teachers and classmate and friends it was so cool. We were there from Monday to Friday we left yesterday at 9am. I am from dysart state school. I just want to say thank you so much for letting my classmates and friends have a great time. you should come and stay at Apex Camps Magnetic Island.
